scripts.concat-css: npx concat -o dist/css/bundle.css assets/css/styles.css assets/css/main.css assets/css/header.css assets/css/nav.css assets/css/footer.css assets/css/modal.css assets/css/forms.css assets/css/catalog.css assets/css/product-detail.css assets/css/checkout.css assets/css/admin.css
scripts.minify-js: npx terser --compress --mangle --module --output dist/js/app.min.js -- assets/js/cart.js assets/js/search.js assets/js/auth.js assets/js/checkout_modal.js assets/js/rating.js
scripts.build: npm run prepare-dirs && npm run copy-js-deps && npm run copy-images && npm run concat-css && npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
